commit_scope: Promote GET /api/lenses into the BML native front door while preserving Python authority for lens detail and mutation paths.

commands: jq -e '.total == 10 and (.lenses | length == 10) and .lenses[0].lens_id == "artistic" and all(.lenses[]; (.lens_id | type == "string") and (.name | type == "string") and (.description | type == "string") and (.archetype_axes | type == "object") and .is_builtin == true and .created_at == "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z")' /tmp/lenses.body
local_validation.notes: Before this slice, runtime_surface_report showed 86 kernel-first-capable routes and /goal identified GET /api/lenses as the next BML route-catalog candidate. After the BML route was added, runtime_surface_report shows 87 capable routes including /api/lenses. The local Rust kernel compiled the BML manifest and advertised 54 native routes, with GET /api/lenses -> native. The local /api/lenses probe returned 200 with X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_lenses, and X-Form-Python-Authority:false. GET /api/lenses/scientific still selected fanout-python against the dummy upstream, preserving Python authority for detail reads.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR creation, hosted checks, merge, and post-merge deploy verification.

deploy_validation.notes: A concurrent main deploy aligned public API and web to a283c12c2000d434f3eb7c08e8f2d0adf6206f89 and pulse returned breathing. This branch has not yet been deployed; post-merge verification must show public GET /api/lenses returns native BML proof headers and total=10.

phase_gate.reason: Local runtime proof passed; hosted CI, merge, production deploy, and public /api/lenses native proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/lenses should be served by the BML native front door with the built-in ten-lens catalog, while GET /api/lenses/{lens_id} and POST /api/lenses remain on the Python/fanout authority path.
e2e_validation.proof: Local kernel serving proof returned native headers and a ten-item lens catalog for /api/lenses; /api/lenses/scientific returned fanout-python headers against a dummy upstream.
test_flows: Static deploy path test fails if the /api/lenses Traefik label, deploy canary, or BML native proof handler is removed.
Hostinger deploy canary probes /api/lenses inside kernel-router-bml-front-door and requires X-Form-Handler: api_lenses.
Public deploy verifier checks /api/lenses for native proof headers and the ten-item built-in lens body contract.

evidence_refs: python3 scripts/runtime_surface_report.py --json reported kernel_first_capable_routes=87 and included /api/lenses.
Local Rust serve compiled deploy/front-door/api.bml and advertised GET /api/lenses -> native.
Local GET /api/lenses returned X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_lenses, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, total=10.
Local GET /api/lenses/scientific returned fanout-python against a dummy upstream, showing the exact GET route did not swallow detail reads.
